title: columnea subcordata
intro: Columnea subcordata is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Columnea subcordata can be prepared as an infusion or a decoction for herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
